description_en: Florence may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 37 halal restaurants and 11 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Florence, Italy, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Florence: 37+ halal restaurants, 11 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.1/5.
